Class WaitFormProperties

Provided properties which are required to create IWaitForm.

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public class WaitFormProperties : ICloneable<WaitFormProperties>

Constructors

WaitFormProperties(string, string, bool, bool)

Initializes a new instance of the WaitFormProperties class with the specified settings.

Declaration
public WaitFormProperties(string caption, string status, bool useFadeIn = true, bool useFadeOut = true)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string caption

A caption for the IWaitForm.
string status

Status message for the IWaitForm.
bool useFadeIn

true, to use the fade-in effect when a IWaitForm is displayed; otherwise, false.
bool useFadeOut

true, to use the fade-out effect when a IWaitForm is closed; otherwise, false.
Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentException

Thrown, If caption is null, empty or whitespace.

Properties

ActiveGlowColor

Gets or sets the color of the glow effect for the IWaitForm displayed in the active state.

Declaration
public Color ActiveGlowColor { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
Color
Remarks

A IWaitForm can be displayed using the glow effect. This effect is enabled, when AllowGlowEffect property set to true.

AllowGlowEffect

Gets or sets whether the IWaitForm is displayed using the glow effect.

Declaration
public bool AllowGlowEffect { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

Caption

Gets the WaitForm's caption.

Declaration
public string Caption { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
string

ClosingDelay

Gets or sets the delay, in milliseconds, before the IWaitForm is closed.

Declaration
public int ClosingDelay { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
int

InactiveGlowColor

Gets or sets the color of the glow effect for the IWaitForm displayed in the inactive state.

Declaration
public Color InactiveGlowColor { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
Color
Remarks

A IWaitForm can be displayed using the glow effect. This effect is enabled, when AllowGlowEffect property set to true.

Status

Sets or sets the status message for the WaitForm.

Declaration
public string Status { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
string

UseFadeInEffect

Gets or sets whether to use a fade-in effect when a IWaitForm is being opened.

Declaration
public bool UseFadeInEffect { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

UseFadeOutEffect

Gets or sets whether to use a fade-out effect when a IWaitForm is being closed.

Declaration
public bool UseFadeOutEffect { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool
